sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: SM Energy slides as crude oil plunges on Strait of Hormuz reopening
feed.summary: SM Energy (SM) shares dropped 7.3% following a significant decline in crude oil prices. This dip is attributed to the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz for commercial tankers, which caused U.S. and Brent crude to fall around 9%, making oil production less profitable. SM Energy's 2026 plan is heavily oil-weighted, and a recent analyst downgrade further amplified the stock's negative performance.

feed.title: FDA lets Philip Morris keep reduced-exposure claims for IQOS
feed.summary: The U.S. FDA has reauthorized Philip Morris International to market its IQOS heated tobacco products with reduced-exposure claims. This decision allows PMI to continue informing adult consumers about the reduced harm potential of IQOS compared to traditional cigarettes, reinforcing PMI's position as a leader in smoke-free alternatives. The FDA based its renewal on scientific evidence showing a significant reduction in exposure to harmful chemicals when switching completely from conventional cigarettes to the IQOS system.

feed.title: Weekly Market Update: Stocks Gain 4.62% to Hit New All-Time High as Tech Rises, Energy Falls
feed.summary: The Morningstar US Market Index rose 4.62% this week, reaching a new all-time high, driven by strong performance in technology and consumer cyclical sectors. Conversely, energy and utilities were the worst-performing sectors. Key gainers included Hims & Hers Health, Affirm, and Robinhood, while top losers included Badger Meter, CarMax, and Venture Global, with various companies also announcing upcoming earnings reports.

feed.title: Ross Stores (NASDAQ:ROST) Reaches New 52-Week High - Should You Buy?
feed.summary: Ross Stores (NASDAQ:ROST) has reached a new 52-week high of $226.98, with analysts generally rating it as a "Moderate Buy." The company reported strong Q4 earnings, beating expectations with an EPS of $2.00 and revenue of $6.64 billion, an increase of 12.2% year-over-year. Despite recent insider selling, major institutional investors have increased their holdings, and the company recently raised its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Biggest near-term hurdle for markets is rates and policy, says Morgan Stanley's Simonetti
feed.summary: Katerina Simonetti of Morgan Stanley states that the biggest near-term hurdle for markets is related to interest rates and policy decisions. She appeared on 'Fast Money' to discuss the current market conditions, challenges to the ongoing market rally, and her outlook for both short-term and long-term market trends. This perspective highlights the influence of monetary policy on market performance.

feed.title: Is Northrop Grumman Corporation (NOC) One of the Best Military Drone Stocks to Buy Right Now?
feed.summary: Northrop Grumman Corporation (NOC) is highlighted as a top military drone stock, known for its advanced uncrewed systems like the MQ-4C Triton. The company recently collaborated with the Marine Corps to develop a Collaborative Combat Aircraft. Analysts currently rate NOC with a "Moderate Buy" and an estimated 13% upside, though the article also suggests exploring AI stocks for potentially higher, quicker returns.

feed.title: Evergy shares preparation plan for Friday evening weather outages
feed.summary: Evergy is preparing for severe weather expected to hit the Kansas City metro on Friday evening, with crews ready to address potential outages and damage. Missouri Governor Mike Kehoe has issued a State of Emergency, urging residents to take the storm threats seriously. Currently, over 3,000 active outages are reported in the metro area as severe storms approach.

feed.title: Advisor Moves: Raymond James nabs Beverly Hills advisor from Morgan Stanley
feed.summary: Raymond James has hired financial advisor Thomas K. Sutter from Morgan Stanley to join its employee advisor channel in Beverly Hills, California. Sutter, who managed approximately $160 million in client assets at Morgan Stanley, will now serve as managing director and senior vice president of wealth management at Highmark Capital Management of Raymond James. This move is part of a trend where Raymond James has been actively recruiting advisors from Morgan Stanley.

feed.title: This Is Why BMO Capital Raised Duke Energy (DUK)’s Price Target
feed.summary: BMO Capital reiterated an "Outperform" rating on Duke Energy Corporation (DUK) and increased its price target to $143 from $136. This positive outlook is driven by the company's long-term prospects, particularly given expected large-scale onboarding activities and the potential for earnings growth from data center uptake. The recent sale of its Tennessee Piedmont Natural Gas business will also help Duke Energy fund its capital plan and reduce debt.

feed.title: The Boeing Company (BA) and Millennium Space Systems to Expand Space Production Capacity
feed.summary: Boeing and its subsidiary Millennium Space Systems are increasing space production capacity to meet rising demand from government and commercial clients. This initiative includes launching a new satellite platform called Resolute, designed for speed and flexibility, and aims for 26 satellite deliveries this year, up from 11 in the previous year. The company also recently secured a $324 million contract for Chinook helicopters and maintains a "Strong Buy" rating from analysts with significant upside potential.

feed.title: CEO succession and tight control highlighted in Southern Copper (SCCO) 2026 proxy filing
feed.summary: Southern Copper Corporation (SCCO) has announced its fully virtual 2026 annual meeting for May 29, 2026. The proxy filing details the unexpected passing of former President and CEO Oscar González Rocha in April 2026 and the subsequent appointment of Leonardo Contreras Lerdo de Tejada as Interim CEO. The filing also highlights Americas Mining Corporation's beneficial ownership of 88.9% of SCCO's outstanding common stock, reinforcing its controlled-company status and applicable NYSE governance exemptions, and provides details on executive compensation and corporate governance.

feed.title: 5 Trends to Watch in a Post-Iran War Landscape
feed.summary: This article discusses five key trends for investors to watch in the aftermath of the Iran war, including a better risk-reward balance for stocks, higher oil prices remaining for longer, a renewed focus on energy efficiency and renewables, a potential rebound for gold due to increased fiscal spending and inflation concerns, and a continued push towards reshoring for national security. The authors suggest that while the immediate conflict may resolve, its long-term economic and geopolitical ramifications will shape investment strategies.

feed.title: Autodesk donates $1.95 million to Howard University and celebrates the opening of new makerspace
feed.summary: Autodesk has donated $1.95 million to Howard University to establish a new Construction Engineering Management program and support the recently opened College of Engineering and Architecture (CEA) Makerspace. This initiative aims to prepare students for the digital future of the construction industry by providing access to advanced technologies and hands-on learning experiences. The partnership builds on a previous $5 million donation from Autodesk in 2024, emphasizing a shared commitment to expanding opportunities and addressing the industry's workforce needs.

feed.title: Southern Copper (NYSE: SCCO) appoints interim CEO after unexpected death
feed.summary: Southern Copper Corporation announced the unexpected passing of its President and Chief Executive Officer, Oscar Gonzalez Rocha, on April 13, 2026. The company's Board of Directors has appointed Leonardo Contreras Lerdo de Tejada as interim CEO, effective April 16, 2026, and he will continue to serve on the Board without initial changes to his compensation. The Board is actively searching for a permanent CEO in accordance with its internal succession planning process.

feed.title: Middle Coast Investing Adds StandardAero Position in First Quarter
feed.summary: Middle Coast Investing has added StandardAero, Inc. (NYSE:SARO) to its investment portfolio in Q1 2026, viewing the aerospace engine aftermarket provider as a strategic move to maintain sector exposure at a competitive valuation. The firm sees the aerospace sector as a "winning area" due to demand backlogs and safety issues, and praises StandardAero's business model, growth, and attractive valuation compared to peers. Despite varied portfolio returns in Q1, Middle Coast Investing emphasizes disciplined investment decisions for resilient businesses.

feed.title: Kinder Morgan VP sells $49,167 in stock By Investing.com

Following the sale, he directly owns 44,843 shares. The company has raised its dividend for 8 consecutive years, with a current yield of 3.68%, and has seen recent analyst upgrades and strategic developments regarding its pipeline projects.

The article encourages investors to consider different valuation narratives and company-specific characteristics.

feed.title: Is Public Service Enterprise Group (PEG) a Top Utility Stock on Earnings Growth Prospects?
feed.summary: Public Service Enterprise Group (PEG) is highlighted as a top utility stock, with BMO Capital reiterating a Market Perform rating and raising its price target to $91. Despite a slight downward revision in the Q1 2026 earnings estimate, the company anticipates over 7% earnings growth in 2026 due to significant investments in regulated infrastructure. PEG, a regulated energy company operating in New Jersey, plans substantial capital spending in regulated assets, emphasizing its commitment to growth and customer

feed.title: Constellation Energy (CEG) Asserts Dominance on Clean Energy with Calvert Cliffs Clean Energy Upgrades
feed.summary: Constellation Energy (CEG) has completed $90 million in equipment upgrades at its Calvert Cliffs Clean Energy Center, underscoring its commitment to clean energy and its dominance in the utility sector. This nuclear plant powers over 1.3 million homes with emission-free energy and significantly contributes to the local economy. The company anticipates strong earnings growth and plans to expand its capacity, solidifying its position as the largest U.S. producer of clean, carbon-free energy.

feed.title: Revolution Medicines (NASDAQ: RVMD) issues $500M 0.50% convertible notes due 2033
feed.summary: Revolution Medicines, Inc. has issued $500 million of 0.50% Convertible Senior Notes due 2033. These senior unsecured notes carry a low interest rate, mature on May 1, 2033, and are convertible into common stock under specific conditions, implying an initial conversion price of approximately $198.80 per share. The offering, underwritten by J.P. Morgan Securities LLC, TD Securities (USA) LLC, and Guggenheim Securities, LLC, provides the company with significant financing while managing potential future equity dilution.

feed.title: SCYNEXIS (NASDAQ: SCYX) asks shareholders to approve 1-for-5–1-for-10 reverse split
feed.summary: SCYNEXIS (NASDAQ: SCYX) is seeking shareholder approval for a reverse stock split at a ratio ranging from 1-for-5 to 1-for-10. This measure is primarily aimed at regaining or maintaining compliance with Nasdaq's minimum bid price requirement. The board will retain discretion on the exact ratio and implementation, which would also proportionately adjust outstanding equity awards and authorized shares.

feed.title: This Is Why NRG Energy (NRG) Is a Top Utility Stock on Data Center Growth
feed.summary: NRG Energy (NRG) is identified as a top utility stock due to its strategic focus on data center growth. Jefferies recently raised its price target for NRG Energy, expecting the company to announce a 1GW combined-cycle gas turbine project with a hyperscaler. The company aims to capitalize on the AI boom, projecting significant EBITDA growth from data center expansion.

feed.title: Trimble (TRMB) senior VP adds stock through RSU and performance awards

(TRMB), reported significant equity compensation activity, including the exercise of 5,767 restricted stock units, receipt of additional common stock grants, and shares withheld for tax obligations. Following these transactions, Keating directly holds 10,494.03 shares of Trimble common stock. The awards were based on a Combined Attainment Factor linked to Annual Recurring Revenue, Total Shareholder Return, and a People & Planet modifier.

feed.title: Trimble (TRMB) SVP Peter Large details stock awards and tax withholding in Form 4
feed.summary: Trimble Inc. Senior Vice President Peter Large reported equity compensation and related tax withholding transactions. He exercised restricted stock units for 6,582 shares and received additional grants totaling 18,252 shares. The company retained 10,165 shares to cover tax obligations, and after these transactions, Large directly holds approximately 31,317 shares of Trimble common stock.

feed.title: SOBR Safe Postpones Scheduled 2026 Annual Shareholder Meeting
feed.summary: SOBR Safe (SOBR) has announced the postponement of its 2026 annual shareholder meeting, originally scheduled for May 18, 2026, to an unspecified later date. The company will release new details regarding the rescheduled meeting and updated voting record date in a future communication. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, assesses SOBR as an "Underperform" due to weak financial performance, bearish technicals, Nasdaq listing concerns, and limited valuation support.

feed.title: Why Did SM Energy Shares Gap Down Despite Mixed Results?
feed.summary: SM Energy's shares experienced a gap down despite mixed results, reflecting shifts in market sentiment and broader energy sector conditions. The company, which focuses on crude oil and natural gas exploration and production, is a component of the NYSE Composite Index. Further details are accessible upon logging into or creating an account.

feed.title: Snail (NASDAQ: SNAL) plans 2026 virtual vote on directors and BDO audit
feed.summary: Snail Inc. (NASDAQ: SNAL) will hold a virtual annual meeting on May 27, 2026, for shareholders to elect eight directors and ratify BDO USA, P.C. as its independent auditor for the 2026 fiscal year. The company operates with a dual-class stock structure, giving founder CEO Hai Shi and director Ying Zhou significant voting control, qualifying Snail as a "controlled company" under Nasdaq rules. Snail also benefits from lighter regulatory requirements as an "emerging growth company" and "smaller reporting company."

feed.title: eBay SVP Sweetnam sells $1.2 million in stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Jordan Douglas Bradley Sweetnam, SVP, Chief Commercial Officer at eBay, sold 12,113 shares of common stock for approximately $1.2 million on April 15, 2026. The sales were executed under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. This transaction occurred as eBay's shares have risen 56% over the past year and are trading near their 52-week high, with InvestingPro analysis suggesting the stock is overvalued.

feed.title: Glazer Capital (NASDAQ: SEMR) discloses 7.28M shares, 5.59% stake
feed.summary: Glazer Capital, LLC and Paul J. Glazer have filed a Schedule 13G, reporting a 5.59% beneficial ownership stake in SEMrush Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: SEMR), amounting to 7,279,468 shares of Class A Common Stock. This filing indicates a passive investment, with shared voting and dispositive power attributed to Glazer-managed funds. Glazer Capital Enhanced Master Fund, Ltd. is noted as having the right to direct proceeds from the sale of over 5% of the outstanding shares.

feed.title: Executive pay, board structure detailed in Semrush (NYSE: SEMR) 10-K/A
feed.summary: Semrush Holdings, Inc. has filed an amended annual report (10-K/A) for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, providing detailed disclosures on its directors, executive compensation, and corporate governance. The amendment outlines the board's composition, independence criteria, and a pay-for-performance compensation philosophy for its executives, including details on base salaries, annual cash incentives tied to ARR and Adjusted EBITDA, and long-term equity incentives comprising RSUs and PSUs. It also includes information on stock ownership guidelines, clawback policies, and the CEO pay ratio, along with specific compensation data for named executive officers in 2025.

feed.title: Paramount Skydance (NASDAQ: PSKY) CFO vests 187,500 RSUs; shares withheld for tax
feed.summary: Paramount Skydance's CFO, Dennis Cinelli, had 187,500 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) vest into Class B common shares on April 15, 2026. This was a scheduled equity compensation event, not an open-market purchase. To cover tax obligations, 88,974 Class B shares were withheld by the company at a reference price of $11.67 per share.

feed.title: Zero Homes Selected by Xcel Energy to Lead Neighborhood Retrofit Program Bringing Whole-Home Electrification to Denver and Aurora
feed.summary: Zero Homes has been chosen by Xcel Energy to lead a $10 million Neighborhood Residential Retrofit Program in Denver and Aurora. This pilot program aims to study the cost-effectiveness of electrifying homes versus maintaining gas infrastructure by offering significant incentives for whole-home energy upgrades. The initiative will provide deeply discounted upgrades, with some income-qualified homeowners receiving 100% coverage, and will gather crucial data to inform future utility investments in clean energy.

feed.title: Starbucks Wins Fifth Circuit Challenge to NLRB Subpoena Ruling
feed.summary: The US Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit has ruled that the National Labor Relations Board (NLRB) was wrong to find Starbucks Corp. in violation of federal labor law due to overly broad subpoenas issued to workers. The court stated that the NLRB incorrectly applied a legal test for quashing subpoenas to determine civil liability. The case has been sent back to the NLRB for reconsideration under the correct legal standard, which focuses on whether the company's conduct was coercive based on the totality of circumstances.

feed.title: ProShares UltraPro QQQ ETF Options Spot-On: On April 17th, 513.84K Contracts Were Traded, With 1.63 Million Open Interest
feed.summary: On April 17th, the ProShares UltraPro QQQ ETF (TQQQ.US) saw significant options trading activity, with 513.84K contracts traded. Call options constituted 59.22% of these transactions. The open interest for TQQQ reached approximately 1.63 million contracts, which is 103.84% of its 30-day average.
